methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.AliyunRosStackProperties.__init__
documentation:
Artifact properties for ROS stacks.

```
param template_file

A file relative to the assembly root which contains the ROS template for this stack.

param parameters

Values for ROS stack parameters that should be passed when the stack is deployed. Default: - No parameters

param stack_name

The name to use for the ROS stack. Default: - name derived from artifact ID

param tags

Values for ROS stack tags that should be passed when the stack is deployed. Default: - No tags
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.AliyunRosStackProperties.template_file
documentation: A file relative to the assembly root which contains the ROS template for this stack.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.AliyunRosStackProperties.parameters
documentation:
Values for ROS stack parameters that should be passed when the stack is deployed.

:default: - No parameters

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.AliyunRosStackProperties.stack_name
documentation:
The name to use for the ROS stack.

:default: - name derived from artifact ID

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.AliyunRosStackProperties.tags
documentation:
Values for ROS stack tags that should be passed when the stack is deployed.

:default: - No tags

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.ArtifactManifest.__init__
documentation:
A manifest for a single artifact within the cloud assembly.

```
param type

The type of artifact.

param dependencies

IDs of artifacts that must be deployed before this artifact. Default: - no dependencies.

param metadata

Associated metadata. Default: - no metadata.

param properties

The set of properties for this artifact (depends on type). Default: - no properties.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.ArtifactManifest.type
documentation: The type of artifact.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.ArtifactManifest.dependencies
documentation:
IDs of artifacts that must be deployed before this artifact.

:default: - no dependencies.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.ArtifactManifest.metadata
documentation:
Associated metadata.

:default: - no metadata.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.ArtifactManifest.properties
documentation:
The set of properties for this artifact (depends on type).

:default: - no properties.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.AssemblyManifest.__init__
documentation:
A manifest which describes the cloud assembly.

```
param version

Protocol version.

param artifacts

The set of artifacts in this assembly. Default: - no artifacts.

param missing

Missing context information. If this field has values, it means that the cloud assembly is not complete and should not be deployed. Default: - no missing context.

param runtime

Runtime information. Default: - no info.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.AssemblyManifest.version
documentation: Protocol version.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.AssemblyManifest.artifacts
documentation:
The set of artifacts in this assembly.

:default: - no artifacts.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.AssemblyManifest.missing
documentation:
Missing context information.

If this field has values, it means that the
cloud assembly is not complete and should not be deployed.

:default: - no missing context.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.AssemblyManifest.runtime
documentation:
Runtime information.

:default: - no info.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerCacheOption.__init__
documentation:
Options for configuring the Docker cache backend.

```
param type

The type of cache to use. Refer to https://docs.docker.com/build/cache/backends/ for full list of backends. Default: - unspecified

param params

Any parameters to pass into the docker cache backend configuration. Refer to https://docs.docker.com/build/cache/backends/ for cache backend configuration. Default: {} No options provided
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerCacheOption.type
documentation:
The type of cache to use.

Refer to <https://docs.docker.com/build/cache/backends/> for full list of backends.

```
default

unspecified
```

Example:

```
'registry'
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerCacheOption.params
documentation:
Any parameters to pass into the docker cache backend configuration.

Refer to https://docs.docker.com/build/cache/backends/ for cache backend configuration.

:default: {} No options provided

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.__init__
documentation:
Properties for how to produce a Docker image from a source.

```
param cache_disabled

Disable the cache and pass --no-cache to the docker build command. Default: - cache is used

param cache_from

Cache from options to pass to the docker build command. Default: - no cache from options are passed to the build command

param cache_to

Cache to options to pass to the docker build command. Default: - no cache to options are passed to the build command

param directory

The directory containing the Docker image build instructions. This path is relative to the asset manifest location. Default: - Exactly one of directory and executable is required

param docker_build_args

Additional build arguments. Only allowed when directory is set. Default: - No additional build arguments

param docker_build_secrets

Additional build secrets. Only allowed when directory is set. Default: - No additional build secrets

param docker_build_ssh

SSH agent socket or keys. Requires building with docker buildkit. Default: - No ssh flag is set

param docker_build_target

Target build stage in a Dockerfile with multiple build stages. Only allowed when directory is set. Default: - The last stage in the Dockerfile

param docker_file

The name of the file with build instructions. Only allowed when directory is set. Default: "Dockerfile"

param docker_outputs

Outputs. Default: - no outputs are passed to the build command (default outputs are used)

param executable

A command-line executable that returns the name of a local Docker image on stdout after being run. Default: - Exactly one of directory and executable is required

param network_mode

Networking mode for the RUN commands during build. Requires Docker Engine API v1.25+. Specify this property to build images on a specific networking mode. Default: - no networking mode specified

param platform

Platform to build for. Requires Docker Buildx. Specify this property to build images on a specific platform/architecture. Default: - current machine platform
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.cache_disabled
documentation:
Disable the cache and pass `--no-cache` to the `docker build` command.

```
default

cache is used
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.cache_from
documentation:
Cache from options to pass to the `docker build` command.

```
default

no cache from options are passed to the build command

see

https://docs.docker.com/build/cache/backends/
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.cache_to
documentation:
Cache to options to pass to the `docker build` command.

```
default

no cache to options are passed to the build command

see

https://docs.docker.com/build/cache/backends/
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.directory
documentation:
The directory containing the Docker image build instructions.

This path is relative to the asset manifest location.

```
default

Exactly one of directory and executable is required
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.docker_build_args
documentation:
Additional build arguments.

Only allowed when `directory` is set.

```
default

No additional build arguments
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.docker_build_secrets
documentation:
Additional build secrets.

Only allowed when `directory` is set.

```
default

No additional build secrets
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.docker_build_ssh
documentation:
SSH agent socket or keys.

Requires building with docker buildkit.

:default: - No ssh flag is set

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.docker_build_target
documentation:
Target build stage in a Dockerfile with multiple build stages.

Only allowed when `directory` is set.

```
default

The last stage in the Dockerfile
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.docker_file
documentation:
The name of the file with build instructions.

Only allowed when `directory` is set.

```
default

"Dockerfile"
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.docker_outputs
documentation:
Outputs.

:default: - no outputs are passed to the build command (default outputs are used)

:see: https://docs.docker.com/engine/reference/commandline/build/#custom-build-outputs

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.executable
documentation:
A command-line executable that returns the name of a local Docker image on stdout after being run.

```
default

Exactly one of directory and executable is required
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.network_mode
documentation:
Networking mode for the RUN commands during build. *Requires Docker Engine API v1.25+*.

Specify this property to build images on a specific networking mode.

:default: - no networking mode specified

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.DockerImageSource.platform
documentation:
Platform to build for. *Requires Docker Buildx*.

Specify this property to build images on a specific platform/architecture.

:default: - current machine platform

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.FileAssetMetadataEntry.__init__
documentation:
Metadata Entry spec for files.

```
param artifact_hash_parameter

The name of the parameter where the hash of the bundled asset should be passed in.

param id

Logical identifier for the asset.

param oss_bucket_parameter

Name of parameter where OSS bucket should be passed in.

param oss_key_parameter

Name of parameter where OSS object key should be passed in.

param packaging

Requested packaging style.

param path

Path on disk to the asset.

param source_hash

The hash of the asset source.
```

Example:

```
const entry = {
  packaging: 'file',
  ossBucketParameter: 'bucket-parameter',
  ossKeyParameter: 'key-parameter',
  artifactHashParameter: 'hash-parameter',
}
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.FileAssetMetadataEntry.artifact_hash_parameter
documentation: The name of the parameter where the hash of the bundled asset should be passed in.

documentation: Logical identifier for the asset.

documentation: Name of parameter where OSS object key should be passed in.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.FileSource.__init__
documentation:
Describe the source of a file asset.

```
param executable

External command which will produce the file asset to upload. Default: - Exactly one of executable and path is required.

param packaging

Packaging method. Only allowed when path is specified. Default: FILE

param path

The filesystem object to upload. This path is relative to the asset manifest location. Default: - Exactly one of executable and path is required.
```

documentation:

```
default

```

documentation:
Packaging method.

Only allowed when `path` is specified.

```
default

FILE
```

The filesystem object to upload.

This path is relative to the asset manifest location.

```
default

Exactly one of executable and path is required.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.HostedZoneContextQuery.__init__
documentation:
Query to hosted zone context provider.

```
param account

Query account.

param domain_name

The domain name e.g. example.com to lookup.

param region

Query region.

param private_zone

True if the zone you want to find is a private hosted zone. Default: false

param vpc_id

The VPC ID to that the private zone must be associated with. If you provide VPC ID and privateZone is false, this will return no results and raise an error. Default: - Required if privateZone=true
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.HostedZoneContextQuery.account
documentation: Query account.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.HostedZoneContextQuery.domain_name
documentation: The domain name e.g. example.com to lookup.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.HostedZoneContextQuery.region
documentation: Query region.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.HostedZoneContextQuery.private_zone
documentation:
True if the zone you want to find is a private hosted zone.

:default: false

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.HostedZoneContextQuery.vpc_id
documentation:
The VPC ID to that the private zone must be associated with.

If you provide VPC ID and privateZone is false, this will return no results
and raise an error.

:default: - Required if privateZone=true

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.VpcContextQuery.__init__
documentation:
Query input for looking up a VPC.

```
param account

Query account.

param filter

Filters to apply to the VPC. Filter parameters are the same as passed to DescribeVpcs.

param region

Query region.

param return_asymmetric_subnets

Whether to populate the subnetGroups field of the {@link VpcContextResponse}, which contains potentially asymmetric subnet groups. Default: false

param subnet_group_name_tag

Optional tag for subnet group name. If not provided, we'll look at the ros-cdk:subnet-name tag. If the subnet does not have the specified tag, we'll use its type as the name. Default: 'ros-cdk:subnet-name'
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.VpcContextQuery.account
documentation: Query account.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.VpcContextQuery.filter
documentation:
Filters to apply to the VPC.

Filter parameters are the same as passed to DescribeVpcs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.VpcContextQuery.region
documentation: Query region.

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.VpcContextQuery.return_asymmetric_subnets
documentation:
Whether to populate the subnetGroups field of the {@link VpcContextResponse}, which contains potentially asymmetric subnet groups.

:default: false

methods.name: ros_cdk_assembly_schema.VpcContextQuery.subnet_group_name_tag
documentation:
Optional tag for subnet group name.

If not provided, we'll look at the ros-cdk:subnet-name tag.
If the subnet does not have the specified tag,
we'll use its type as the name.

:default: 'ros-cdk:subnet-name'
